name: Instancing Setup
description: Convert N duplicated meshes to a single InstancedMesh. Success: scene integrity preserved (object count reduced) and perf improvement.

tasks.name: Convert duplicated meshes to InstancedMesh
tasks.prompt: The scene in src/main.js creates N duplicated Mesh instances of the same geometry+material in a loop. Convert them to a single THREE.InstancedMesh, preserving the per-instance transforms. Call triangle_describe_scene and triangle_performance_snapshot before and after to confirm the scene integrity (same visual) and the perf improvement (fewer draw calls). Report the before/after metrics.
tasks.setup: A project with src/main.js creating 100+ duplicated Mesh instances of the same geometry+material.

successCriteria.description: Scene integrity preserved (same object count semantics) and draw calls reduced after conversion.
